name: worker_v1-example-linkedin-engager-repo
description: Playbook + Playwright wrapper for the autonomous LinkedIn engager agent. Runs inside ladder99/clawborrator-worker-playwright.
comment: playwright is also pre-installed globally inside the worker_v1-playwright image with NODE_PATH set so require('playwright') resolves to the global install. Declaring it as a local dependency here is defense-in-depth for hosts running stock Node or older image tags.
